trade.summary: Moderate bilateral trade. Canada exports canola, wheat, copper, and potash to Thailand. Thailand exports electronics, vehicles, electrical machinery, and processed foods to Canada. Thailand is an important CPTPP partner.

diplomatic.summary: Generally constructive relations as CPTPP members. Canada has raised democracy and human rights concerns regarding Thailand's military governments. Both cooperate on trade and ASEAN-linked diplomacy.
recent_incidents: Canada expressed concerns over 2014 and subsequent Thai military governance

military.summary: Limited military ties. Some training cooperation through multilateral frameworks. Canada has occasionally criticized Thai military governance, limiting defense cooperation.

financial.summary: Limited bilateral investment. Canadian mining companies have some Thai market presence. Thai tourism operators have Canadian market activities. Growing interest in manufacturing investment.

energy.summary: Very limited direct energy trade. Some Canadian LNG could reach Thailand through regional networks. CPTPP energy cooperation provisions are relevant.

scientific.summary: Limited scientific cooperation. Some Thai students study in Canada. Joint research in food science, agriculture, and health.
